body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.

**Heartbeat-evoked neural response abnormalities in generalized anxiety disorder during peripheral adrenergic stimulation.**. medRxiv.. PMID: 37398268. DOI: 10.1101/2023.06.09.23291166. Hyperarousal symptoms in generalized anxiety disorder (GAD) are often incongruent with the observed physiological state, suggesting that abnormal processing of interoceptive signals is acharacteristic feature of the disorder.
